subject: FW: Your album has been shared!
body:
Jeffrey,

Here are some landscaping pictures and pictures of the new boat from
ProKat and the enclosure being installed on Midnight Express.

I need to send $ 30,000 from the owed balance of $ 81,500. May I go
ahead and wire the funds?

Thank you

Subject: LSJ Landscaping and Boats 

 

 <http://www.kodakgallery.com/images/invisible.gif>

subject: FW: Your album has been shared!
body:
Jeffrey

 

Here are a couple of pictures of the Powder Coated enclosure. The glass
will be installed this week, then we will make a schedule with Midnight
Express to go and install it on the boat.

 

Balance owed on the enclosure is $ 17,996.

They are requesting a payment of $ 10,000 before the enclosure is
installed and the balance before the sliding door is installed.

 

Make I proceed with the $ 10,000 wire?

 

Thank you

 

 

 

Subject: Midnight Express 

	
 <http://www.kodakgallery.com/images/invisible.gif> 

If you can't see the pictures in this email, click here to see it in a
web browser:

subject: FW: Your album has been shared!
body:
Jeffrey,

 

The pictures of the Scorpion is of a 9.75 Meter which is similar to the
10  meter hull that has been built for your boat.

 

Midnight Express enclosure with glass installed is due to be completed
by February 20th and the sliding door by March 14th, all work by
Midnight Express has been completed.

 

I am getting some additional pictures of Midnight Express later today.

Subject: Boats

body_html:
Jeffrey,

 

The pictures of the Scorpion is of a 9.75 Meter which is similar to the 10  meter hull that has been built for your boat.

 

Midnight Express enclosure with glass installed is due to be completed by February 20th and the sliding door by March 14th, all work by Midnight Express has been completed.

 

I am getting some additional pictures of Midnight Express later today.

Subject: Boats

If you can't see the pictures in this email, click here to see it in a web browser:
http://www.kodakgallery.com/I.jsp?c=k0utekm.4o7gd1ku&x=0&y=9agism

 

Emad has shared photos with you.

Scorpion and Midnight Express

(1 album)


You're invited to view my online photos at the Gallery. Enjoy!

- Emad
